audit_items.proof_trace: Emitter::add_close_mapping is a single-line delegate to SourceMap::add_close_mapping, which calls std::vector::push_back on a Mapping struct containing only size_t value fields — no raw new/malloc allocations exist in either function. All memory is RAII-managed by std::vector<Mapping> inside SourceMap; there are no explicit error paths requiring manual cleanup because there is nothing to manually free.
